headline: Cathie Wood buys $40 million of beaten-down fintech stock
summary: Most investors see a stock drop 13% after a bad earnings report and walk away. One of the most closely watched portfolio managers in the market saw the same setup and moved in the opposite direction. What Cathie Wood's ARK Invest did the very next morning is the kind of move that forces the market ...

headline: 5 Stocks Investors Couldn't Stop Buzzing About This Week: AAPL, GOOG, HOOD And More
summary: Retail investors talked up five hot stocks this week (April 27 to May 1) on X and Reddit's r/WallStreetBets: AAPL, GOOG, HOOD, META, LLY.
